creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Eugene Grosbein from comment #9)

Yes, it is. The above described problem can be easily reproduced on any APU we run with nanobsd and mpd5 running and configured using PPPoE. A simple "service mpd5 restart" triggers the failure.

In the meanwhile, FreeBSD used on those nodes is
FreeBSD 14.1-STABLE #1 stable/14-n268432-33708452aaab: Fri Aug  9 20:35:11 CEST 2024 amd64.

Host hardware: PCengines APU2C4
